Cross-timeline win-rate stress test

Source: R/mxo_strategy.R
mxo_timeline_win_rate.Rd

Reports the fraction of decisive games (non-draws) whose winning line includes a dL != 0 step (axis class "timeline" or "mixed"). The rules §12 stress-test number — a value far above the spatial baseline suggests the timeline axis may be over-easy and warrants a rule review.

Usage

mxo_timeline_win_rate(
  policy_x,
  policy_o,
  n_games = 30L,
  config = mxo_config_default(),
  seed = NULL
)

Arguments

policy_x, policy_o

mxo_policy objects.

n_games

Integer scalar, total games to play.

config

A config list (see mxo_config_default()).

seed

Optional integer base seed.

Value

A tibble with columns n_games, n_wins, cross_timeline_wins, cross_timeline_fraction, plus a counts-by-axis-class breakdown.

On this page

Developed by Raban Heller.
